title: Achievements Expand Border
description: Complete achievements/advancements to progress & grow your Minecraft world border. (or die, possibly get trolled by your spawn)
body:
- I will have a new project started soon with this data pack allowing some mods to be supported!(when it will be released not sure)
- AEB Gives you a challenge of having a world border you can't explore past until you complete achievements/advancements! For every one completed your world border will expand by 42 blocks!
- If you so choose to change the size the border expands open the zip file got to \data\awbepd\function\player and use VSC to select all the 42 numbers on the far right ONLY and change them to what ever you desire!
